take_garment_from_stack.query: a worker grasps the top light-blue folded garment and removes it from the stack

spread_garment_on_table.query: a worker places a light-blue garment in the center of the table and unfolds or spreads it flat

fold_garment_sides.query: a worker folds the left and right sides of a light-blue garment inward and straightens the folded garment on the table

pick_up_hanger.query: a worker reaches to the pile of black clothes hangers on the left and lifts one black hanger
